name: git-guardian-enterprise
label: GitGuardian Enterprise
description: GitGuardian Enterprise is a security platform designed to detect, monitor, and remediate secrets (like API keys, passwords, and tokens) and sensitive data exposed in source code, CI/CD pipelines, containers, and developer environments.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.name: server_url
fields.description: Specify the server URL of the GitGuardian Enterprise server to connect and perform automated operations.
fields.tooltip: Specify the server URL of the GitGuardian Enterprise server to connect and perform automated operations.

fields.title: API Key
fields.name: api_key
fields.tooltip: Specify the API Key to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations.
fields.description: Specify the API Key to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations.

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true

operations.title: Get All Audit Logs
operations.description: Retrieve a list of audit logs from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the specified filter parameters.

parameters.title: Include Actor(s)
parameters.name: actor__in
parameters.description: Filter results to include only logs performed by specific actor usernames.
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of usernames to include as actors in the audit log results.

parameters.title: Exclude Actor(s)
parameters.name: actor__nin
parameters.description: Exclude audit logs performed by specified actor usernames.
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of usernames to exclude from the audit log results.

parameters.title: Actor Email
parameters.name: actor_email
parameters.description: Filter logs based on the email address of the actor who performed the action.
parameters.tooltip: Exact match filter for the actor's email address.

parameters.title: Ordering
parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Specify how results should be ordered, such as by timestamp or actor name.
parameters.tooltip: Specify how results should be ordered, such as by timestamp or actor name.

parameters.title: Full-Text Search
parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across multiple fields of the audit logs.
parameters.tooltip: Enter keywords to search audit log entries.

parameters.title: Type
parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter audit logs by a specific event type.
parameters.tooltip: Specify a single event type, e.g., 'login.success' or 'organization.user_invite'.

parameters.title: Include Types
parameters.name: type__in
parameters.description: Include logs of multiple event types.
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of event types to include in results.

parameters.title: Exclude Types
parameters.name: type__nin
parameters.description: Exclude logs of specific event types.
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of event types to exclude from results.

parameters.title: Page Number
parameters.description: Specify the page number from which to retrieve audit log results when pagination is used. Default is 0.
parameters.name: page
parameters.tooltip: Used for pagination: page number to retrieve. Default is 0.

parameters.title: Results Per Page
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page when pagination is applied.
parameters.name: per_page
parameters.tooltip: How many results to include per page. Default varies by API.

operations.title: Get Audit Log Details
operations.description: Retrieve specific audit log details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the provided audit log ID.

parameters.title: Audit Log ID
parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Specify the audit log ID to retrieve its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Audit Log ID from the response of the "Get All Audit Logs" action.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the audit log ID to retrieve its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Audit Log ID from the response of the "Get All Audit Logs" action.

operations.title: Get Audit Log Actors/Types
operations.description: Retrieve a list of audit log actors or types from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the audit log metadata and other filter parameter you have specified.

parameters.title: Audit Log Metadata
parameters.name: audit_log_metadata
parameters.description: Select the audit log metadata to retrieve its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. "Audit Log Actors" retrieve a list of members whose actions have generated audit log entries. "Audit Log Types" retrieve a list of available audit log types.
parameters.tooltip: Select the audit log metadata to retrieve its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. "Audit Log Actors" retrieve a list of members whose actions have generated audit log entries. "Audit Log Types" retrieve a list of available audit log types.

parameters.title: Page Number
parameters.description: Specify the page number from which to retrieve audit log actors/types results when pagination is used. Default is 0.
parameters.name: page
parameters.tooltip: Used for pagination: page number to retrieve. Default is 0.

parameters.title: Results Per Page
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page when pagination is applied.
parameters.name: per_page
parameters.tooltip: How many results to include per page. Default varies by API.

operations.title: Get All Git Users
operations.description: Retrieve a list of git users from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the git type and other filter parameters you have specified.

parameters.title: Git Type
parameters.name: git_type
parameters.description: Select the type of Git platform to retrieve a users. You can choose from the following options: GIT Users or GITHub Users.
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of Git platform to retrieve a users. You can choose from the following options: GIT Users or GITHub Users.

parameters.title: Page Number
parameters.description: Specify the page number from which to retrieve git users results when pagination is used. Default is 0.
parameters.name: page
parameters.tooltip: Used for pagination: page number to retrieve. Default is 0.

parameters.title: Results Per Page
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page when pagination is applied.
parameters.name: per_page
parameters.tooltip: How many results to include per page. Default varies by API.

operations.title: Get Git User Details
operations.description: Retrieve specific git user details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the git type and it's ID specified.

parameters.title: Git Type
parameters.name: git_type
parameters.description: Select the type of Git platform to retrieve a users. You can choose from the following options: GIT Users or GITHub Users.
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of Git platform to retrieve a users. You can choose from the following options: GIT Users or GITHub Users.

GIT Users.title: GIT User ID
GIT Users.name: id
GIT Users.description: Specify the GIT user ID to retrieve its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the GIT User ID from the response of the "Get All Git Users" action.
GIT Users.tooltip: Specify the GIT user ID to retrieve its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the GIT User ID from the response of the "Get All Git Users" action.

GITHub Users.title: GITHub User ID
GITHub Users.name: id
GITHub Users.description: Specify the GITHub user ID to retrieve its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the GITHub User ID from the response of the "Get All Git Users" action.
GITHub Users.tooltip: Specify the GITHub user ID to retrieve its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the GITHub User ID from the response of the "Get All Git Users" action.

operations.title: Create Keyword
operations.description: Creates a new keyword in the GitGuardian Enterprise server, it will be in PENDING state until GitGuardian approves or refuses the keyword.

parameters.title: Keyword ID
parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Specify the keyword ID based on which you want to create a keyword.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the keyword ID based on which you want to create a keyword.

parameters.title: Keyword Name
parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Specify the keyword name based on which you want to create a keyword.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the keyword name based on which you want to create a keyword.

parameters.title: Keyword
parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Specify the keyword based on which you want to create a keyword.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the keyword based on which you want to create a keyword.

parameters.title: Categories
parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Select one or more options of categories based on which you want to create a keyword. You can choose one or more from the following options: Secret Grasper, Incident Raiser, or Incident Raiser On Perimeter.
parameters.tooltip: Select one or more options of categories based on which you want to create a keyword. You can choose one or more from the following options: Secret Grasper, Incident Raiser, or Incident Raiser On Perimeter.

parameters.title: Status
parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Select the status based on which you want to create a keyword. You can choose from the following options: Pending, Active, or Deactivated.
parameters.tooltip: Select the status based on which you want to create a keyword. You can choose from the following options: Pending, Active, or Deactivated.

parameters.title: Keyword Type
parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Select the type of the keyword based on which you want to create a keyword. You can choose from the following options: Raw or Regexp
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of the keyword based on which you want to create a keyword. You can choose from the following options: Raw or Regexp

parameters.title: Labels
parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: Specify the comma-separated list of integer labels based on which you want to create a keyword.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the comma-separated list of integer labels based on which you want to create a keyword.

parameters.title: Created At
parameters.name: created_at
parameters.description: Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created after the specified timestamp.
parameters.tooltip: Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created after the specified timestamp.

operations.title: Get All Keywords
operations.description: Retrieve a list of keywords from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the specified filter parameters.

parameters.title: Keyword Type
parameters.name: keyword_type
parameters.description: Select the type of keyword to retrieve a details. You can choose from the following options: Incident Raiser or Secret Grasper.
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of Git platform to retrieve a users. You can choose from the following options: Incident Raiser or Secret Grasper.

parameters.title: Categories
parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Select the category based on which you want to retrieve a keywords. You can choose from the following options: Secret Grasper, Incident Raiser, or Incident Raiser On Perimeter.
parameters.tooltip: Select the category based on which you want to retrieve a keywords. You can choose from the following options: Secret Grasper, Incident Raiser, or Incident Raiser On Perimeter.

parameters.title: Status
parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Select the status based on which you want to retrieve a keywords. You can choose from the following options: Pending, Active, or Deactivated.
parameters.tooltip: Select the status based on which you want to retrieve a keywords. You can choose from the following options: Pending, Active, or Deactivated.

parameters.title: Keyword Type
parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Select the type of the keyword based on which you want to retrieve a keywords. You can choose from the following options: Raw or Regexp
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of the keyword based on which you want to retrieve a keywords. You can choose from the following options: Raw or Regexp

parameters.title: Ordering
parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Specify how results should be ordered, such as by name or status.
parameters.tooltip: Specify how results should be ordered, such as by name or status.

parameters.title: Full-Text Search
parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across multiple fields of the keywords.
parameters.tooltip: Enter keywords to search keywords entries.

parameters.title: Include Labels
parameters.name: labels__in
parameters.description: Include keywords of multiple labels.
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of keyword labels to include in results.

parameters.title: Exclude Labels
parameters.name: labels__nin
parameters.description: Exclude keywords of multiple labels
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of keyword labels to exclude from results.

parameters.title: Include Status
parameters.name: status__in
parameters.description: Include keywords of multiple status.
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of keyword status to include in results.

parameters.title: Exclude Status
parameters.name: status__nin
parameters.description: Exclude keywords of multiple status
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of keyword status to exclude from results.

parameters.title: Include Types
parameters.name: type__in
parameters.description: Include logs of multiple event types.
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of event types to include in results.

parameters.title: Exclude Types
parameters.name: type__nin
parameters.description: Exclude logs of multiple event types.
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of event types to exclude from results.

parameters.title: Page Number
parameters.description: Specify the page number from which to retrieve keywords results when pagination is used. Default is 0.
parameters.name: page
parameters.tooltip: Used for pagination: page number to retrieve. Default is 0.

parameters.title: Results Per Page
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page when pagination is applied.
parameters.name: per_page
parameters.tooltip: How many results to include per page. Default varies by API.

operations.description: Update a specific keyword details in the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the keyword type, name, labels, and it's ID specified.

parameters.title: Keyword Type
parameters.name: keyword_type
parameters.description: Select the type of keyword to update a details. You can choose from the following options: Incident Raiser or Secret Grasper.
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of keyword to update a details. You can choose from the following options: Incident Raiser or Secret Grasper.

Incident Raiser.title: Incident Raiser ID
Incident Raiser.name: id
Incident Raiser.description: Specify the Incident Raiser ID to update its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Raiser ID from the response of the "Get All Keywords" action.

operations.title: Delete Keyword
operations.description: Deletes a specific keyword from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the keyword type and it's ID specified.

parameters.title: Keyword Type
parameters.name: keyword_type
parameters.description: Select the type of keyword to delete a specific keyword. You can choose from the following options: Incident Raiser or Secret Grasper.
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of keyword to delete a specific keyword. You can choose from the following options: Incident Raiser or Secret Grasper.

Incident Raiser.title: Incident Raiser ID
Incident Raiser.name: id
Incident Raiser.description: Specify the Incident Raiser ID to delete its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Raiser ID from the response of the "Get All Keywords" action.
Incident Raiser.tooltip: Specify the Incident Raiser ID to delete its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Raiser ID from the response of the "Get All Keywords" action.

Secret Grasper.title: Secret Grasper ID
Secret Grasper.name: id

Secret Grasper.tooltip: Specify the Secret Grasper ID to delete its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Secret Grasper ID from the response of the "Get All Keywords" action.

operations.title: Export Keywords
operations.description: Exports the keyword as CSV file from the GitGuardian Enterprise server.

operations.title: Get All Incident Secrets
operations.description: Retrieve a list of incident secrets from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the specified filter parameters.

parameters.title: Full-Text Search
parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across multiple fields of the incident secrets.
parameters.tooltip: Enter keywords to search incident secrets entries.

parameters.title: Severity
parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Specify the comma-separated list of severity based on which you want to retrieve a incident secrets.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the comma-separated list of severity based on which you want to retrieve a incident secrets.

parameters.title: Status
parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Specify the comma-separated list of status based on which you want to retrieve a incident secrets.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the comma-separated list of status based on which you want to retrieve a incident secrets.

parameters.title: Created At (Current Period)
parameters.name: created_at__current
parameters.description: Select a time range to filter incident secrets based on when they were created. You can choose from the following current Day, Week, Month, or Year.
parameters.tooltip: Select a time range to filter incident secrets based on when they were created. You can choose from the following current Day, Week, Month, or Year.

parameters.title: Created From
parameters.name: created_at__from
parameters.description: Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created after the specified timestamp.
parameters.tooltip: Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created after the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: Created To
parameters.name: created_at__to
parameters.description: Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created before the specified timestamp.
parameters.tooltip: Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created before the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: Ordering
parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Specify how results should be ordered, such as by timestamp or actor name.
parameters.tooltip: Specify how results should be ordered, such as by timestamp or actor name.

parameters.title: Page Number
parameters.description: Specify the page number from which to retrieve incident keywords results when pagination is used. Default is 0.
parameters.name: page
parameters.tooltip: Used for pagination: page number to retrieve. Default is 0.

parameters.title: Results Per Page
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page when pagination is applied.
parameters.name: per_page
parameters.tooltip: How many results to include per page. Default varies by API.

parameters.title: Additional Parameters
parameters.description: Specify additional parameters with which to filter incident secrets in GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can refer this link for more fields: https://enterprise.gitguardian.com/api/docs#operation/incidents_secrets_list
parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.tooltip: Specify additional parameters with which to filter incident secrets in GitGuardian Enterprise server.

operations.title: Get Incident Secret Details
operations.description: Retrieve specific incident secret details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the provided incident secret ID.

parameters.title: Incident Secret ID
parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Specify the incident secret ID to retrieve its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Secret ID from the response of the "Get All Incident Secrets" action.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the incident secret ID to retrieve its details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Secret ID from the response of the "Get All Incident Secrets" action.

operations.title: Update Incident Secret Status
operations.description: Updates a specific incident secret details in the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the provided incident secret ID and status.

parameters.title: Incident Secret ID
parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Specify the incident secret ID to update its details in the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Secret ID from the response of the "Get All Incident Secrets" action.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the incident secret ID to update its details in the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Secret ID from the response of the "Get All Incident Secrets" action.

parameters.title: Status
parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Select the status based on which you want to update a incident secret. You can choose from the following options: Acknowledge, Add Note, Assign, Reopen, Resolve, Set Severity, UnAcknowledge, or UnAssign.
parameters.tooltip: Select the status based on which you want to update a incident secret. You can choose from the following options: Acknowledge, Add Note, Assign, Reopen, Resolve, Set Severity, UnAcknowledge, or UnAssign.

operations.title: Create Incident Secret Shared Link
operations.description: Create a public link for the incident to request feedback from anyone outside of the platform using the provided incident secret ID.

parameters.title: Incident Secret ID
parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Specify the incident secret ID to create shared link in the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Secret ID from the response of the "Get All Incident Secrets" action.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the incident secret ID to create shared link in the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Secret ID from the response of the "Get All Incident Secrets" action.

operations.title: Rotate Incident Secret Shared Link
operations.description: Delete any of the previously created links, and create a fresh one using the provided incident secret ID.

parameters.title: Incident Secret ID
parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Specify the incident secret ID to rotate shared link in the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Secret ID from the response of the "Get All Incident Secrets" action.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the incident secret ID to rotate shared link in the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Secret ID from the response of the "Get All Incident Secrets" action.

operations.title: Delete Incident Secret Shared Link
operations.description: Deactivate and delete a given shared link using the provided incident secret ID.

parameters.title: Incident Secret ID
parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Specify the incident secret ID to deactivate and delete shared link in the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Secret ID from the response of the "Get All Incident Secrets" action.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the incident secret ID to deactivate abd delete shared link in the GitGuardian Enterprise server. You can obtain the Incident Secret ID from the response of the "Get All Incident Secrets" action.

operations.title: Execute an API Request
operations.description: Sends an API request to an API endpoint based on specified HTTP method, endpoint, and other input parameters that you have specified, enabling flexible API interactions tailored to user needs.

parameters.name: method
parameters.title: HTTP Method
parameters.description:
Select an HTTP action for the request. You can select from the following options:  

DELETE 

GET 

PATCH 

POST 

PUT

parameters.title: Endpoint
parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.tooltip: Specify the target API URL path for example: audit_logs
parameters.description: Specify the target API URL path for the request. For example, if the website is https://example.com and URL path is https://example.com/images/pic.jpg, the endpoint would be images/pic.jpg.

parameters.title: Query Parameters
parameters.name: query_params
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify any optional parameters to add to the URL and refine the request.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.title: Request Payload
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify data, as JSON, to be sent as the request payload (typically for POST or PUT requests).
